title: sambucus buergeriana var. miquelii
intro: Sambucus buergeriana var. miquelii is a variety of the elderberry plant native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Sambucus buergeriana var. miquelii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of illnesses and promote overall well-being.
